reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Commented that the function name is self-explaining and suggested it's not necessary to include a comment. Acknowledged the patch with an Acked-by.

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch extracts a helper function, mm_prepare_for_swap_entries(), to ensure the mm is added to init_mm.mmlist for swapoff to find and unuse its swap entries. The double-checked locking pattern was previously open-coded in try_to_unmap_one() and copy_nonpresent_pte().
